nodes.label: lib/skills.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the Skill interface and BUILTIN_SKILLS array listing trigger keywords and prompt templates for widget-generating skills.

nodes.label: Skill
nodes.summary: TypeScript interface defining a skill with name, trigger keyword, description, and prompt template fields.

nodes.label: BUILTIN_SKILLS
nodes.summary: Array of built-in skill definitions covering kanban, dashboard, gravity simulation, and interactive table triggers.

edges.note: The 'kanban' trigger skill maps to the kanban widget type defined by KanbanParamsSchema
The 'gravity' trigger skill maps to the gravity widget type defined by GravityParamsSchema
The 'dashboard' trigger skill maps to the dashboard widget type
